specializations: Bio-based cosmetic ingredient precursors via fermentation
Bio-BDO (1,4-butanediol) for cosmetic humectancy and formulation
Sustainable nylon and polymer precursors for beauty packaging
Metabolic engineering for cosmetic chemical production
Commercial-scale bio-based intermediates for personal care
product_highlights: Brontide™ Bio-BDO — USDA-certified 100% bio-based 1,4-butanediol from fermentation, used as a humectant and solvent in cosmetic formulations
Bio-based intermediate chemicals enabling sustainable ingredient supply chains for personal care
Metabolic engineering platform for cost-competitive production of multi-carbon bio-based molecules
Commercial partnerships enabling scale-up with Novamont and other major chemical companies
notes: Genomatica is a San Diego-based industrial biotechnology company specialising in the metabolic engineering of microorganisms to produce bio-based chemical intermediates at commercial scale. Their flagship product, Brontide™ Bio-BDO (1,4-butanediol), is a USDA-certified 100% bio-based humectant and solvent that offers a sustainable alternative to petroleum-derived BDO in cosmetic formulations. Genomatica's biotech platform enables the economically competitive production of multi-carbon bio-based molecules that serve as precursors for nylons, polyesters, and cosmetic actives, providing personal care brands with a credible route to bio-based ingredient supply chains.
